title: D1.2: Risk Assessment Process and Management Procedure
author: IXS
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document details the procedure within IDEA-FAST by which the project risks are identified, categorised and monitored. The most important, critical risks are already described in Annex I of the Grant Agreement. Additional risks will be identified as part of the project review and planning process.
steps_raw: This document details the procedure within IDEA-FAST by which the project risks are identified, categorised and monitored. The most important, critical risks are already described in Annex I of the Grant Agreement. Additional risks will be identified as part of the project review and planning process.
